An EF1 tornado touched down just east of Yatesville Lake then tracked eastward skipping along an almost six and half mile track, crossing US 23 and the Big Sandy River just north of Louisa before continuing into West Virginia before ending 2 miles east of Fort Gay. Damage was mostly confined to snapped and uprooted hardwood trees, but at least three homes were damaged and two semi trailers were overturned.

Corrects previous tornado report from 1 SSW Athens. An EF1 tornado with maximum winds up to 100 mph tracked 2.3 miles across Athens County touching down near Angel Ridge Road and lifting just past Kincade Road. Damage was confined to snapped and uprooted trees and some snapped power poles.
